negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Phase 1 fee calculation does not return dedicated image/audio/video Phase 1 calculators; calculate_async_fees rejects those precompile addresses instead of pricing them.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs has calculate_two_phase_fees_phase1 but only uses it for long-running HTTP and sovereign agent in calculate_async_fees.

notes: The port recognizes media precompile metadata but does not price all three media Phase 1 submissions.
rationale: The primary merge adds image/audio/video branches to the general async fee calculation path and documents that Phase 1 just returns a job id while Phase 2 uses actual output dimensions or duration. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Phase 1 fee calculation for image, audio, and video precompiles must return their dedicated Phase 1 fee calculators based on input length, because Phase 2 output work is priced after delivery.
suggested_falsification_tests: Call calculate_async_fees for 0x0818, 0x0819, and 0x081A with representative input lengths and assert each returns Ok from the corresponding Phase 1 fee calculator rather than an unsupported-precompile error.
summary: Image/audio/video Phase 1 fee calculators are absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Call calculate_async_fees for 0x0818, 0x0819, and 0x081A with representative input lengths and assert each returns Ok from the corresponding Phase 1 fee calculator rather than an unsupported-precompile error.
title: Multimodal Phase 1 uses constant async fees
